name: terminal-link
usage_summary: Imported in packages/cli-kit/src/private/node/content-tokens.ts. Used in `LinkContentToken.output()` to produce an OSC 8 hyperlink string with a custom fallback renderer. The fallback option is the main reason for the dependency over a raw `ansiEscapes.link()` call.
how_to_remove: Replace with a direct call to `ansiEscapes.link(text, url)` (already present in the codebase via the Link.tsx component) plus a manual terminal-support check (see supports-hyperlinks above). The fallback logic (5 lines) can be inlined. Only one production call site in content-tokens.ts.
replacement_reason: ansi-escapes is already used in the codebase (Link.tsx uses `ansiEscapes.link`) and covers the OSC 8 link generation. Inlining the fallback eliminates the terminal-link dependency entirely.
